nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: collaborate throughout a task, most of my tasks are too complicated to let it handle independently

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the app seems to significantly degrade when you get a long context

nodes.label: Context management as strategic skill
nodes.grounding_span: context management is a key skill I have found after using lots of AI tools

nodes.label: Human authenticity in code documentation
nodes.grounding_span: I still prefer to document and write comments for code myself

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: I want to take credit for my work, not AI tools

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I consider AI to be one of my key skills at this point in time

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It eventually is faster and better than me researching through documentation or google

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I want to take credit for my work, not AI tools

nodes.label: Professional competence and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I am a fast learner and adaptable so I believe im largely okay in the long run

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: It eventually is faster and better than me researching through documentation or google

nodes.label: Preference for human writing
nodes.grounding_span: I dislike reading AI generated comments or documentation

nodes.label: Concern about workplace perception of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: it just would raise questions in my head

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I consider AI to be one of my key skills at this point in time

nodes.label: Iterative context distillation across conversations
nodes.grounding_span: I may start with the problem and in the first conversation 'waste' some of the context gathering initial insights

nodes.label: Domain-based compartmentalization of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I generally avoid putting in any work related information though and try to keep my searches general
